topic_title: Donald Trump and Lula da Silva meet at White House to relink US-Brazil relations
topic_summary: Donald Trump and Lula da Silva held a private meeting in the Oval Office aimed at pragmatically relinking the relationship between the United States and Brazil. While both leaders characterized the meeting as successful, observers noted lingering tensions regarding trade tariffs and regional security.

findings.summary:

findings.title: Trump and Lula at the White House: a relationship built on pragmatism and a broader regional calculus
findings.summary: Bilateral meeting between both presidents sent a clear signal to Lulaâ€™s domestic audience: the relationship with Washington is not broken, and it does not require a Bolsonaro to fix it.
